heroHeadline: El Mayo Sentencing 6 Days Away — 621 Days Since Capture, 575 Days of Cartel Civil War
heroSubtitle: 621 days since Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada's alleged kidnapping — 2,412+ homicides, 9,000+ families displaced. El Mayo faces mandatory life imprisonment and a $15 billion forfeiture at his April 13 sentencing before Judge Brian Cogan (EDNY); US prosecution response to defense memo filed April 6. Good Friday (Apr 4): 8 murdered in Culiacán — 34th municipal police officer killed since war began. Escuinapa surge continues: 4 officers killed (Mar 31), army clash with cartel-recruited minors (Apr 5). Mexican Navy dismantled Chapitos-linked meth lab in Cosalá (Apr 3, 1,000L of P2P). La Mayiza controls approximately 90% of former Chapitos territory.
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae, La Jornada, CBC News, Excelsior, El Diario del Noroeste
